title: 2 High-Yield Financial Stocks to Earn Passive Income for Years
text: This pair of financials have big yields and strong businesses, backed up by impressive dividend-paying histories.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For October 2022
text: NOBL fell 2.78% in August which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 9.16%. Thus far, through September 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 6.71%, bringing its year-to-date return to -15.25%.

title: T. Rowe Price: A Dividend Aristocrat To Keep An Eye On
text: Shares of T. Rowe Price have had a rough 2022 and are down 40% YTD. AUM has taken a hit in 2022, but the company's margins have remained impressive despite a decline in revenues compared to 2021.

title: T. Rowe Price: This Is The Time To Be Brave And Buy
text: Leading asset manager T. Rowe Price has continued to struggle, given its exposure to equity markets and weak investor sentiment. However, we gleaned that TROW has likely formed its long-term bottom in June, despite the high pessimism in the market. Hence, we view the recent pullback constructively.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: If you're looking for dividend stocks to buy and hold forever, a good place to start is companies that have done an excellent job increasing their dividends and are expected to keep doing so in the future.  While the first place to look for such names should logically be a list of S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats, I widened the search to the S&P 1500.

title: 4 S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat Dogs To Buy, 1 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of September 8, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 16.54%-36.34% topped by VFC & SWK.

title: Using the Rule of 40 to Find Growth Opportunities
text: Growth investors use the rule of 40 as a screening tool to quickly assess companies while balancing the growth rate and profit margins. The idea of the rule is that the growth rate plus the profit margin should meet or exceed 40%.

title: Earn Passive Income for Years With This Dividend Aristocrat
text: This investment manager is a dividend juggernaut.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For September 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of September. The watchlist posted a loss of 4.88% in August and is now down 12.85% year-to-date.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For September 2022
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 17.78% over the past 22 months.
